case_title: YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC VS. ALLIED PEST MANAGEMENT, INC.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,276.41 FILED BY YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC AS TO DEFENDANT APPLIED PEST MANAGEMENT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-07-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APPLIED PEST MANAGEMENT, INC. $1,138.00 PRINCIPAL, $189.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,327.00, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2276.00 - AND ALLOCATES FAULT EQUALLY TO EACH PARTY. THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT APPLIED PEST MANAGEMENT, INC. $1,138.00 PRINCIPAL, $139.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,277.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-23-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT APPLIED PEST MANAGEMENT, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2008 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER FOR AMENDED JUDGMENT RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY 28, 2010
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR NOTICE OF INTENTION TO ISSUE AMENDED AND CORRECTED JUDGMENT AND ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SET FOR MAY-28-2010 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING OF MAY-28-2010 - AMENDED JUDGMENT ISSUED. MR. WEINER PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE PRESENT, NO APPEARANCE BY OTHER PARTY. JUDGE JAMES J. MCBRIDE, CLERK SHAWNA VANTREE, REPORTER RITA HOWELL (206).
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-07-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-07-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
